action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess shows full preprocess() fails on ALL variants with ObservationProcessorStep error (language step #0 mutates dict, drops 'observation' for step #1). Mock test runs but predict falls back to random-delta action (mock success=1.0 but real evals=0.0 across tasks). RecordingEvaluator now completes without attr errors. PI0 loads fine. Analysis: Pipeline is training-oriented (expects full transition with preserved keys after LanguageProcessorStep); merging lang_output + obs dict (PIL 224x224 images for 3 views, padded state=32, dummy_action=32) will restore 'observation' and satisfy all steps per lerobot/processor/pipeline.py. This is still the intended Pi0 track (no from-scratch). Evaluator contract satisfied via super().evaluate_single_episode + per-episode JSON collection. Delta bridge (pos*0.1, rot*0.5, grip>0) + action chunking (predict_action_chunk + pending queue) will amortize cost and improve over fallback. Decision: Overwrite test_preprocess.py with per-step sequential application + lang-merge diagnostic (try 4 lang_input variants); update predict.py to FULL complete version (use best merge format from diagnostic in predict(), full main() for eval_config.json parsing + exact output JSON, complete RecordingEvaluator, improved _action_to_ee with current_ee_state delta, chunking, debug prints only on error). Run both tests for validation (expect FULL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED + mock movement). Then submit_eval for first non-zero success_rate measurement.
